knowledge.insight: KVD: Day 1 of practice = get a big picture view of the whole lake. Day 2 = dial in and refine. Find areas and patterns that fit your strengths. Once you find the best area, everything else is just a secondary pattern.

KVD: 'You got to find areas and patterns that fit your strengths.' As a power fisherman, KVD looks for areas where power techniques (crankbaits, bladed jigs) can produce quality bites, not just numbers.
